name: hero-city-design-alignment
description: Validate reference-aligned HUD, wall combat billboard, combat camera, and hero action controls.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild("PunchWallHUD") local left=g:FindFirstChild("LeftHeroNavigation") local right=g:FindFirstChild("RightHeroNavigation") local controls=g:FindFirstChild("MobileControls") return H:JSONEncode({status=g:FindFirstChild("HeroStatusDeck")~=nil,statusCards=g.HeroStatusDeck and #g.HeroStatusDeck:GetChildren() or 0,leftButtons=left and #left:GetChildren() or 0,rightButtons=right and #right:GetChildren() or 0,nextWorld=g:FindFirstChild("NextWorldProgress")~=nil,quest=g:FindFirstChild("ObjectiveCard")~=nil,punch=controls and controls:FindFirstChild("ActionPunch")~=nil,jump=controls and controls:FindFirstChild("ActionJump")~=nil,spawnReveal=g:GetAttribute("SpawnRevealPlayed")==true})

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local wall=root.Walls:FindFirstChild("Brick Wall") local bricks,vehicles,road=0,0,0 for _,d in ipairs(root.Polish:GetDescendants()) do if d:GetAttribute("PolishRole")=="ModularDestructionBrick" and string.find(d.Name,"Brick Wall",1,true) then bricks+=1 elseif d:GetAttribute("VisualRole")=="StreetVehicle" then vehicles+=1 elseif d:GetAttribute("VisualRole")=="HeroCityRoadDetail" then road+=1 end end local board=wall and wall:FindFirstChild("WallCombatBillboard") local physical=wall and wall:FindFirstChild("PhysicalCombatSign") return H:JSONEncode({bricks=bricks,vehicles=vehicles,road=road,billboard=board~=nil,physical=physical~=nil,level=board and board:FindFirstChild("WallLevel",true)~=nil,hp=board and board:FindFirstChild("HPText",true)~=nil,role=wall and wall:GetAttribute("VisualRole")})

steps.label: layered wall target and in-world HP exist

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local wall=workspace.PunchWallRPG.Walls:FindFirstChild("Brick Wall") local root=game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") if wall and root then root.CFrame=CFrame.new(wall.Position+Vector3.new(0,0,14),wall.Position) end task.wait(.6) local gui=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD return H:JSONEncode({autoFocus=gui:GetAttribute("CombatCameraActive"),cameraType=workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraType.Name})

steps.label: camera remains player controlled near wall

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local function overlap(a,b) return a.Visible and b.Visible and a.AbsolutePosition.X<a.AbsolutePosition.X+b.AbsoluteSize.X and a.AbsolutePosition.X+a.AbsoluteSize.X>b.AbsolutePosition.X and a.AbsolutePosition.Y<b.AbsolutePosition.Y+b.AbsoluteSize.Y and a.AbsolutePosition.Y+a.AbsoluteSize.Y>b.AbsolutePosition.Y end return H:JSONEncode({questClear=not overlap(g.TargetWallHUD,g.ObjectiveCard),actionsClear=not overlap(g.TargetWallHUD,g.MobileControls),statusClear=not overlap(g.TargetWallHUD,g.HeroStatusDeck)})

steps.label: mobile combat HUD avoids quest status and actions

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local command=game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation") local result=command:Invoke("Spin") return H:JSONEncode(result)

steps.label: hero spin grants a real reward
